intro: Eleutherococcus phanerophlebius, also known as the Sichuan or Tibetan Ginseng, is a type of adaptogenic plant that belongs to the Araliaceae family. The health benefits of Eleutherococcus phanerophlebius include its ability to enhance physical and mental performance, improve immune function, and reduce stress and fatigue. The bioactive constituents of this plant include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to contribute to its adaptogenic properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Eleutherococcus phanerophlebius is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is commonly used to make teas, capsules, and tablets that are available in various herbal supplement forms.
